title: Shear Chickens
description: Allows you to use shears on chickens too, like sheep!
body:
# 🐔 Shear Chicken 

This mod gives you the ability to use shears like you would with sheep, but for chickens too.

Feel free to edit the config file that generates when you launch the game!

# 📜 Config

- shearCooldown - this is in ticks, per chicken, the delay between shearing, saves.
- shearDamage - how much durability damage your shears take when you use them.
- minimumFeathers - the lowest possible amount of feathers you can get
- maximumFeathers - the most possible feathers you can get
